hooks.command: bash -c 'TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "\-\-no-verify"; then echo "BLOCKED: --no-verify flag detected. Pre-commit hooks must not be skipped."; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o "\"file_path\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\"[^\"]*\"" | head -1 | sed "s/.*\"\([^\"]*\)\"$/\1/"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE "\.rs$"; then echo "[reminder] Rust file modified — consider using rust-reviewer agent for quality review"; fi; exit 0'
